name: Oven-Baked Battered Scallops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the garlic to yield 1/2 teaspoon.
2. Preheat the oven to 500°F (260°C).
3. Combine buttermilk and minced garlic in a shallow dish.
4. Dip each scallop into the mixture, allowing it to soak for a few seconds.
5. Coat the scallops with vegetable spray on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Drain excess liquid from the scallops by shaking off any drips.
7. Roll each scallop in bread crumbs and paprika until evenly coated.
8. Place the coated scallops on the prepared baking sheet.
9. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the scallops are opaque throughout.
10. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with parsley.
Note: Per serving: 165 calories, 2 grams fat (11%), 39 milligrams cholesterol, 22 grams protein, 13 milligrams carbohydrates, and 308 milligrams sodium.
